title: Deputy/Editor, International News
description:
Job Description

  • Conceptualise and plan editorial content in consultation with Supervising Editors 
  • Maintain a strong focus on contextualising stories for an Asian audience, in line with CNA’s mandate to help people Understand Asia 
  • Monitor news wires, global media and online sources to identify top stories in Asia and beyond, ensuring key developments are not missed 
  • Build rundowns for hourly bulletins, assigning stories to editors and producers 
  • Edit scripts to maintain a high standard of English and broadcast news writing, adhering to Mediacorp’s editorial standards and the CNA Style Guide 
  • Write compelling news scripts that integrate graphics (including augmented reality), visuals and soundbites to tell engaging, relevant stories 
  • Train and develop proficiency in desktop video editing software 
  • Break news quickly, accurately and responsibly 
  • React swiftly to developing stories, updating scripts and rundowns to reflect the latest developments 
  • Demonstrate composure and clear communication in high-pressure, live production environments, taking instructions from supervisors and cascading them to the team 
  • Work effectively with producers and studio production teams during live newscasts and special programmes, ensuring seamless coordination 
  • Collaborate closely with other editorial units, including the International Desk, Singapore Desk and Digital Desk 
  • Stay informed of global news trends, competitor activity and audience insights to enhance editorial output 
  • Ensure compliance with regulatory policies and guidelines, advising producers and presenters on adherence and best practices 
  • Learn to leverage AI tools for research, verification and editorial quality checks 

Qualifications

  • Degree in Journalism, Mass Communication, Media Studies or Arts & Social Sciences 
  • Minimum seven years’ experience in journalism or a media-related field 
  • Excellent command of English, both written and spoken; second or third languages a plus 
  • Deep interest in international news and current affairs 
  • Strong storytelling ability and visual sensibility 
  • Independent, resourceful, collaborative team player with excellent interpersonal skills  
  • Solid understanding of TV news production and editorial workflows 
  • Interest and knowledge in mobile journalism and emerging reporting technologies 
  • Proficiency with social media platforms used for newsgathering and audience engagement 
  • Familiarity with broadcast production codes and regulatory guidelines 
  • Willingness to work irregular shifts, including weekends and public holidays

postedCompany.description:
Mediacorp is Singapore’s leading media company with the most complete range of platforms, spanning television, radio, newspapers, magazines, movies, digital and out-of-home media.

It pioneered the development of Singapore’s broadcasting industry, with the broadcast of Radio in 1936 and Television in 1963. Today, Mediacorp has over 50 products and brands in four languages (English, Mandarin, Malay and Tamil), reaching out to all adults in Singapore every week.

Initiatives in the new digital space include Internet TV-on-demand, High Definition TV broadcast and Over-the-Top (OTT) interactive services.

Beyond Singapore, Mediacorp is an active regional player through co-productions in TV dramas and movies, magazines publishing, as well as Channel NewsAsia International, one of the first Asian-owned English news channels.

Our financial and strategic relationship in the region includes International Media Corporation in Vietnam, which was set up to develop and produce television entertainment and economic news content. Mediacorp also has a stake in Singapore-based retail firm Reebonz, one of the region’s fastest growing luxury online retailers and a majority stake in Cubinet Interactive, a Malaysian digital games publisher.

Winner of numerous international awards and accolades including Asian Television Awards’ Terrestrial Broadcaster of the Year, Mediacorp’s mission is to engage, entertain and enrich audiences by harnessing the power of creativity.
postedCompany.name: MEDIACORP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
